timeline.label: Q1 FY2026 10-Q: revenue $469M, net income $281M; long-term debt reduced to $596M after $300M repayment
FY2025 10-K: revenue $1.03B, operating cash flow $705M; Sandstorm combination closed in 2025
Sandstorm Gold combination: net cash paid $411M; goodwill and deferred tax liabilities expanded balance sheet
Pre-combination FY2024 10-K baseline: revenue $719M, operating income $430M
FY2023 revenue $606M; royalty portfolio pre-Sandstorm scale
Continued stream and royalty acquisitions; equity method investments began appearing on balance sheet
Fiscal year-end change and portfolio expansion period documented in transitional 10-K
Elliott Management SC 13D/A on file (activist/long context)
Elliott Management initial SC 13D/A after position build

industry.structure: Precious-metals royalty and streaming is concentrated among Royal Gold, Franco-Nevada, Wheaton Precious Metals, and Osisko; barriers are capital access, counterparty relationships, and underwriting discipline on development assets.
industry.share_shift: Large consolidators acquire development-stage streams; Royal Gold's 2025 Sandstorm deal enlarged attributable ounces versus standalone peers.
industry.trend: Elevated gold prices in 2025-2026 support royalty revenue; operators face cost inflation and project delays that affect development-stage option timing.
